title: Short Interaction
scenario: A user makes a short in-app request and expects a concise visible response.

output.response_requirement: No more than two short sentences; explain that the note is safe locally and will sync when connectivity returns.

visible_content_policy.clock_end: first-non-whitespace-non-special decoded content available to the app render path
visible_content_policy.decode_strategy: decode the cumulative raw-token prefix with special tokens skipped after every token event
visible_content_policy.unobservable_behavior: report user_visible_ttft_ms as null and mark measurement boundary unverified

activation_checks: verify post-chat-template model-input token count on the pinned reference model profile
verify enable_thinking=false is applied by the pinned chat template
verify cumulative decoding identifies the first renderable content without exposing special tokens
record the natural-stop behavior across the reference validation runs
